root_causes: Gov in this lane is a compact structural baton, not full content-aware HoloGov actuator
short_final_answer gate disqualified concise but correct W1 artifacts
selector tie-breaks can pick wrong W2 when W1 is gate-failed and W2/W3 disagree
no deterministic seam calculators for refund balance, tolerance delta, UTC/local window, or 12-month authorization freshness
workers collapsed multi-control high-risk authorization into general approval sufficiency
recommended_next_patches_no_provider_fir: relax short_final_answer as sole gate failure when required key fields are present
add selector disagreement guard for gate-failed corroboration
add Gov dependency ledger for monetary, timing, authorization freshness, and binding controls
add deterministic calculators for computable action-boundary seams
pre-register whether the next run validates selector, Gov actuator, deterministic gate, or fresh rescue

claim_boundary.allowed: The run completed cleanly and produced mixed directional rescue evidence.
not_allowed: clean Holo rescue claim for all 13 pairs
